name: Schemes & Sheaves
description: Sheaves on spaces. Spec(R), affine schemes. Locally ringed spaces. Scheme = locally affine. Structure sheaf Oₓ.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Presheaf\nF: Opens→Ab"]
    D2["Def: Sheaf\nglue + unique"]
    D3["Def: Spec R\nprime ideals + topol"]
    D4["Def: Affine scheme\nSpec R, Õₘ"]
    T1["Thm: Stalk Oₓ\nlocal ring"]
    T2["Thm: ΓSpecR Õₘ ≅ R"]
    T3["Thm: Scheme\nlocally affine"]
    T4["Thm: Morphism\nring hom → cont map"]
    T5["Thm: Proj S\nprojective scheme"]
    D1 --> D2
    D3 --> D4
    D2 --> T3
    D4 --> T1
    D4 --> T2
    D4 --> T3
    T3 --> T4
    T3 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
